description: Nuclear Decay Process. This nuclear physics process visualization demonstrates nuclear decay and radioactivity. The flowchart shows unstable inputs and decay energy, nuclear decay methods and decay modes, nuclear decay operations and decay products, intermediate results, and final nuclear decay outputs.
mermaid:
graph TD
A1[Unstable Nucleus] --> B1[Nuclear Decay Method]
C1[Decay Energy] --> D1[Decay Mode]
E1[Decay Products] --> F1[Nuclear Decay Analysis]
B1 --> G1[Alpha Decay]
D1 --> H1[Beta Decay]
F1 --> I1[Gamma Decay]
G1 --> J1[Alpha Particle]
H1 --> K1[Beta Particle]
I1 --> L1[Gamma Ray]
J1 --> M1[Decay Constant]
K1 --> L1
L1 --> N1[Half Life]
M1 --> O1[Decay Rate]
N1 --> P1[Decay Chain]
O1 --> Q1[Nuclear Decay Process]
P1 --> R1[Nuclear Decay Validation]
Q1 --> S1[Nuclear Decay Verification]
R1 --> T1[Nuclear Decay Result]
S1 --> U1[Nuclear Decay Analysis]
T1 --> V1[Nuclear Decay Parameters]
U1 --> W1[Nuclear Decay Output]
V1 --> X1[Nuclear Decay Analysis]
W1 --> Y1[Nuclear Decay Final Result]
X1 --> Z1[Nuclear Decay Complete]

    style A1 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff

name: Nuclear Decay
notes: Converted from physics batch HTML. Process number: 1.

sources.notes: Chemistry process visualization: Nuclear Decay. Created using the Programming Framework methodology for process analysis and visualization.
sources.title: Programming Framework: A Universal Process Visualization Methodology

sources.authors: Filippone BW, Gentile TR, Pattie RW Jr.
sources.title: Precision measurements of neutron beta decay

sources.authors: Johnson CW, Haxton WC, Vogel P.
sources.title: Nuclear gamma decay: From fundamental symmetries to astrophysical implications
